title: Madhyamakavatara: Entering the Middle Way
description: Chandrakirti's masterwork joining Nagarjuna's emptiness philosophy with the bodhisattva path.
introduction: Chandrakirti's masterwork joining Nagarjuna's emptiness philosophy with the bodhisattva path.

translation.text: In the beginning, in the middle, and at the end, compassion alone is essential.
